_comment: Agent Context Center — opt-in Claude Code file-write hook. Paste the 'hooks' block into your own .claude/settings.json (or project .claude/settings.local.json) to re-stamp the dashboard after the agent edits a file. The generator is deterministic, so an unchanged repo yields no diff. Requires the 'acc' generator on PATH (see templates/refresh/README.md); $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR is supplied by Claude Code. Narrow the matcher or add a path test if you only want to re-stamp on markdown edits.
